title: Investigation: Liberal Democrats (GB)
text:
Subject: Liberal Democrats (GB)

Investigated for: The late reporting of five donations

Decision: No determination of offence

Summary of reasons: The Commission decided that in all circumstances of the case it was not proportionate to continue the investigation. It was specifically noted that four of the delayed reports related to a misunderstanding of the aggregation rules, and that the aggregation guidance had recently been updated. The age of the fifth late reported donation was taken into consideration as well as changes to party officials. No determination of offence was therefore made, and the case was closed with no further action.
